title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 470.140 - Writ of possession to issue
text:
470.140.  Writ of possession to issue. — When judgment is rendered for, and the title to such real estate described in the information is vested in the state, a writ shall be issued to the sheriff of the same county, commanding him to seize said real estate.
(RSMo 1939 § 633) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 633; 1919 § 5322; 1909 § 6269
